relationships.context: Alan is hiring an engineer for Melly
Alan decided to proceed with Careerspan hosting the hiring funnel
V is the founder of Careerspan and will help translate JD into skill map
Head of AI collaborates with V on assessment configuration

V is guiding Alan through the Careerspan hiring process

Careerspan configures conversational assessments rather than requiring client-designed rubrics

The funnel is anonymous and distributed via curated communities, not public job boards
